topic: A toaster burns the same word into the bread every morning.
title: My Toaster Burns The Same Word Into My Bread Every Morning | True Scary Story

scenes.narration: My toaster burns the same word into the bread every single morning.
scenes.image_prompt: a slice of toast with a faint burned pattern across it, on a plate in a dim kitchen, low light, grain, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: It is a cheap chrome toaster I bought years ago.
scenes.image_prompt: an old chrome two slot toaster on a kitchen counter, dim morning light, shadow, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I make toast the same way each day.
scenes.image_prompt: a hand lowering bread into a toaster, soft window light, deep shadow, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: One morning the word stay was scorched across both slices.
scenes.image_prompt: two slices of toast with a dark scorched marking, on a counter, dim light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I laughed. Then I stopped laughing.
scenes.image_prompt: a plate of toast on a kitchen table, an empty chair across from it, gloomy light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Every loaf after that came out burned with the same word.
scenes.image_prompt: a stack of toast slices each bearing a faint dark mark, dim kitchen, grain, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: So I bought a brand new toaster and threw the old one out.
scenes.image_prompt: a shiny new toaster still in its box on a counter, low light, shadow, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: The first slice from the new one read stay as well.
scenes.image_prompt: a single slice of toast with a dark scorched word, harsh angled light, deep shadow, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I stopped making toast. The smell of burning woke me anyway.
scenes.image_prompt: a dark kitchen at night with faint smoke near a toaster, dim glow, fog, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Each morning a fresh burned slice waited, though I had toasted nothing.
scenes.image_prompt: a single plated slice of toast on an empty counter at dawn, gray light, shadow, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I packed my bags. I left the bread in the cupboard.
scenes.image_prompt: a packed suitcase by a kitchen doorway, dim light, long shadow, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: This morning the toast at my new place read welcome home.
scenes.image_prompt: a slice of toast with a faint scorched marking on an unfamiliar counter, dim light, fog, vertical 9:16 framing
